entry.name: BorderlessWindows
entry.label: Hide KWin borders and title bars on application windows

entry.name: CenterFocusedColumn
entry.label: Center tiled columns after horizontal focus navigation

entry.name: CenterFocusedColumnOnOverflow
entry.label: Center focused columns when old and new columns do not both fit

entry.name: AlwaysCenterSingleColumn
entry.label: Keep a single tiled column centered

entry.name: ShowTabIndicator
entry.label: Show a transient OSD for tabbed-window selection

entry.name: TouchpadNavigation
entry.label: Enable horizontal touchpad navigation

entry.name: TouchpadWorkspaceNavigation
entry.label: Enable vertical touchpad desktop navigation

entry.name: WorkspaceAutoBackAndForth
entry.label: Repeat the current desktop number to return to the last-used desktop

entry.name: EmptyDesktopAboveFirst
entry.label: Keep an empty virtual desktop before the first occupied desktop

entry.name: TouchpadNavigationFingerCount
entry.label: Touchpad navigation finger count

entry.name: TouchpadNaturalScroll
entry.label: Use natural swipe direction

entry.name: Gap
entry.label: Window gap in logical pixels

entry.name: DefaultColumnWidthPercent
entry.label: Default column width in percent

entry.name: DefaultColumnWidthPixels
entry.label: Fixed default column width in logical pixels; zero uses percent

entry.name: DefaultWindowHeight
entry.label: Default initial tiled client height

entry.name: DefaultInitialDestination
entry.label: Default initial desktop and output destination

entry.name: DefaultInitialFocus
entry.label: Default initial focus behavior

entry.name: DefaultFloatingPosition
entry.label: Default initial floating position

entry.name: DefaultColumnPresentation
entry.label: Default column presentation

entry.name: ColumnWidthStepPercent
entry.label: Column width step in percent

entry.name: ColumnWidthStepPixels
entry.label: Fixed column width step in logical pixels; zero uses percent

entry.name: ColumnWidthPresets
entry.label: Column width presets in percent or pixels

entry.name: WindowHeightStepPercent
entry.label: Window height step in percent

entry.name: WindowHeightStepPixels
entry.label: Fixed window height step in logical pixels; zero uses percent

entry.name: WindowHeightPresets
entry.label: Window height presets in percent or pixels

entry.name: ApplicationColumnPresentations
entry.label: Column presentations by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationColumnWidths
entry.label: Initial column widths in percent or pixels by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationWindowHeights
entry.label: Initial tiled client heights in percent or pixels by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationFocusCentering
entry.label: Applications centered after horizontal focus navigation by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialDestinations
entry.label: Initial application desktop and output destinations by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialFloating
entry.label: Applications initially floating by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationFloatingPositions
entry.label: Application floating positions by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialFullWidth
entry.label: Applications initially full-width by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialMaximized
entry.label: Applications initially maximized by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialFocused
entry.label: Applications initially focused by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialUnfocused
entry.label: Applications initially unfocused by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationInitialFullscreen
entry.label: Applications initially fullscreen by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationTilingExclusions
entry.label: Applications excluded from tiling by application identifier

entry.name: ApplicationBorderlessExclusions
entry.label: Applications keeping KWin borders and title bars by application identifier
